questions.question: Paul warns that in later times some will depart from the faith to follow what?
options: Deceitful spirits and teachings of demons
questions.correct: Deceitful spirits and teachings of demons
questions.feedback: Some will depart from the faith, following deceitful spirits and teachings of demons.

questions.question: What does Paul tell Timothy not to let anyone look down on?
questions.feedback: Let no one despise you for your youth — set an example in speech and conduct.

questions.question: Paul says that physical training has some value.
questions.feedback: Physical training has some value, but godliness has value for all things.

questions.question: Everything created by God is good and nothing is to be _____ if received with thanksgiving.
questions.feedback: Everything God created is good and should not be rejected if received with thanksgiving.

questions.question: Paul tells Timothy to devote himself to the public reading of Scripture, to _____, and to teaching.
questions.feedback: Devote yourself to the public reading of Scripture, exhortation, and teaching.
